name: ForeScout CounterACT
description: This app implements various network access control actions for ForeScout

actions.name: Get Device Info
actions.description: Get the properties of a host

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: Host ID of device (Used first, if provided)

parameters.name: host_ip
parameters.description: Current local IP address of device (Used second, if provided)

parameters.name: host_mac
parameters.description: Host MAC address of device (Used last, if provided)

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Comma separated list of policies or policy sub-rules

parameters.name: prop_val
parameters.description: Comma separated list of host property values (ie: Prop_String=Sales,Prop_Int=5)

actions.name: Install Firewall
actions.description: Install a virtual firewall with a property

parameters.name: host_key_name
parameters.description: Type of identifier used to specify the endpoint

parameters.name: host_key_value
parameters.description: IP or MAC address of the virtual firewall to install

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: The property that will be added

parameters.name: property_value
parameters.description: The value of the property

actions.name: Delete Property
actions.description: Delete a property of a host

parameters.name: host_key_name
parameters.description: Type of identifier used to specify the host

parameters.name: host_key_value
parameters.description: Identifier value used to specify the host

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: The property that will be deleted

actions.name: Update Property
actions.description: Update a property of a host

parameters.name: host_key_name
parameters.description: Type of identifier used to specify the host

parameters.name: host_key_value
parameters.description: Identifier value used to specify the host

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: The property that will be modified

parameters.name: property_value
parameters.description: The new value of the property

parameters.name: create_host
parameters.description: If set to true and the host is not known to CounterACT, create a new host

actions.name: Update List
actions.description: Update a list by adding, deleting, or deleting all values from it

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Type of update for list

parameters.name: list_name
parameters.description: Name of list to update

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: Comma separated list of values to update. This field is required for add_list_values and delete_list_values actions
